prestazioni: Engine: Replace the factory 6.0L V8 (AM28 engine code) with a fully built internals package featuring forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Pair with a custom dry-sump oiling system by Dailey Engineering to eliminate oil starvation during high-G cornering.

Forced Induction: Install a twin-turbo system using Garrett GTX5533R turbos (86mm compressor wheels, .96 A/R turbine housings) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and a custom intercooler setup by PWR (bar-and-plate core, 1200cfm airflow capacity). Utilize a Motec M150 ECU with a bespoke turbo calibration map for 1200+ hp on E85 fuel.

Suspension & Handling: Replace the factory setup with a full Öhlins TTX46 coilover system (3-way adjustable damping, 24-position rebound, and 22-position compression) paired with AST 5200 Series remote-reservoir dampers for the rear. Install a full carbon-fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Vorsteiner, along with a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, T45 steel) to stiffen the chassis by 35%.
estetica: Aero: Fit a full Rocket Bunny Vantage V600 widebody kit (carbon-fiber fenders, extended rockers, and aggressive front canards) with a custom 3D-printed rear wing by 9 Lives Racing (dual-element, 1800mm span, adjustable angle of attack).

Wheels & Brakes: Mount custom 20x11.5 (front) and 21x13 (rear) forged wheels by HRE (FF16 flow-formed, 3-piece construction) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (325/25R21 rear). Upgrade to a full AP Racing CP9760 brake kit (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 405mm two-piece rotors and Pagid RSL29 brake pads.

Interior & Details: Replace the factory interior with a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard, Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon-fiber shells, FIA-homologated), and a custom titanium roll cage by Custom Cages. Add a digital dash by AIM MXS Strada and a bespoke titanium shift knob by B&B Italia, paired with a carbon-fiber shift boot by Seibon.
